problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
hypothesis: Acoustic levitation for contactless manipulation may resolve Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
